title: UP Board Result 2026 highlights: UPMSP 10th, 12th results declared; official website crashes; pass percentage announced
description: UP Board Result 2026 highlights: UPMSP 10th, 12th results announced today. Shikha Verma has secured the top position in the Class 12 results. Nandini Gupta and Shreya Verma have jointly claimed the second rank, while Surbhi Yadav and Pooja Pal have secured the third position.
